title: cakile aegyptica var. australis
intro:
Cakile aegyptica var. australis, commonly known as sea rocket or beach rocket, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The health benefits of this plant include its potential use as a natural remedy for various ailments, such as inflammation and digestive issues. The therapeutic actions of Cakile aegyptica var. australis include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. However, specific information on its bioactive constituents is limited in current knowledge, and further research is required to confirm its therapeutic actions and health benefits.

Note: The information about the bioactive constituents of Cakile aegyptica var. australis is limited, and further research is needed to confirm its therapeutic actions and health benefits.

The flowers, on the other hand, contain essential oils and phenolic compounds, including limonene and beta-sitosterol, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues.
